g.title: Developer or team member
Container engine
Remote modules
bash/sh/PowerShell and external binaries resolved from host PATH
Claude, Codex/OpenAI, Gemini, and local Ollama
**CUE** Resolved OS-specific config path
**CUE** invowkfile.cue command definitions
**Directories** *.invowkmod directories with invowkmod.cue + invowkfile.cue
**Filesystem** ~/.invowk/modules/
**Go/Cobra** Root, cmd, init, config, module, tui, validate, completion, audit, agent
**Go** Execution pipeline: discover, resolve definitions, validate inputs, resolve runtime, build context, dry-run gate, host-access port, dispatch

**Go** Infrastructure adapters implementing commandsvc and deps ports: host access, runtime registry construction, interactive execution, host probes, runtime dependency probes, and host-callback server.
**Go** Validates host dependencies and selected container runtime dependencies
**Go** Resolves runtime selection and builds runtime.ExecutionContext. Command Service dispatches through runtime.Registry.
**Go** Locates invowkfiles and modules with precedence ordering
**Go/CUE** Loads and validates user configuration
**Go/cuelang** 3-step parsing: compile schema, unify data, decode

**Go** Git-based dependency resolution with caching. Implementation split across internal/app/modulesync (resolution + lock file), internal/app/moduleops (packaging + vendoring), and internal/app/modulecache (per-request memoization). Domain types live in pkg/invowkmod.
**Go/fsnotify** File-watching with debounced re-execution for --ivk-watch mode
**Go** Security scanning of module system. Detects supply-chain risks, path traversal, symlink abuse, env var injection. Supports --llm.
**Go** LLM-assisted custom-command authoring. Renders agent prompts, resolves LLM config, validates generated CUE, and patches invowkfile.cue.
**Go** internal/app/llmconfig resolves configured defaults, provider selection, API settings, model requirements, and env-backed credentials.
**Go** internal/auditllm and internal/llm adapt audit analysis and agent command authoring to CLI providers and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
**Go** Executes via host shell (bash/sh/PowerShell)
**Go/mvdan-sh** Embedded shell interpreter with u-root builtins. Not a sandbox: unknown commands fall through to host PATH.
**Go** Executes inside Docker/Podman containers
**Go** Unified Docker/Podman interface with auto-fallback
**Go** Pure persistent-container targeting policy shared by dry-run planning and container execution
**Go** Creates ephemeral layers with invowk binary and modules
**Go/Wish** Enables container-to-host callbacks via SSH tunneling
**Go/Bubble Tea** HTTP server for TUI requests from child processes
**Go** Shared internal/core/serverbase state machine for SSH and TUI server startup, running, stopping, stopped, and failed transitions.
**Go** internal/tuiwire defines delegated TUI component names, request/response JSON envelopes, and INVOWK_TUI_* environment variables.
